scope.dependency_radius: README, INDEX, future migration planning only
non_goals: No content rewrite of existing technical docs

inputs.architecture_target: Clarify .dev information architecture and reduce overlap between guides, standards, and AI collaboration docs
user_constraints: Keep work records under .dev/refactor-workflows when appropriate

steps: Inventory current guides and standards categories
Draft target structure and migration mapping
Record the proposal in a dedicated workflow artifact
validation: Proposal distinguishes standards vs guides roles
deferred_items: Index and link migration after approval

results.summary: Created a documentation structure refactor plan and proposal before any file moves, with the current direction clarified as renaming `.dev/ai-skill-guides/` and placing it under `.dev/guides/ai-collaboration-guides/`.
